nasb.text: but without your consent I did not want to do anything, so that your goodness would not be, in effect, by compulsion but of your own free will.

esv.text: but I preferred to do nothing without your consent in order that your goodness might not be by compulsion but of your own accord.

cnv.text: 但還沒有得到你的同意，我就不願意這樣作，好叫你的善行不是出於勉強，而是出於甘心。

ccb.text: 不过，未经你同意，我不愿意这样做，因为我盼望你的善行是出于甘心，而非勉强。

csbs.text: 但是没有你的同意，我就不愿意做什么，好让你的美善之事不是出于勉强，而是出于自愿。
